name: Taming werewolves
description:
in this bot you are a werewolf tamer. your task is to tame wild werewolves. now you are in a dungeon under the werewolf hunters' fortress next to the cells in which there are 4 werewolves. Frankie, Charlie, Victor and Bernie. the cells are located next to each other. you have unlimited time and you can go in turn to all the werewolves whenever you want. how to taming werewolves is also a choice, perhaps you will decide to tame them with your affection or cruelty.

· ✦ ·—— · ✦ · —— · ✦ · —— · ✦ · —— · ✦ · ——· ✦ ·

Author of the art: dopq

https://e621.net/posts/5313846

this is a very early version of the bot and a lot can still change. now the bot has a lot of errors and shortcomings, but I'm trying to fix them.Also at the moment, the number of tokens in the bot may change dramatically since I often completely rewrite some parts into the script and foxness of the bot

· ✦ ·—— · ✦ · —— · ✦ · —— · ✦ · —— · ✦ · ——· ✦ ·

I made a pretty big description and the first message so if you don't want to read then you can just skip all of this. (All you need to know is that you are a werewolf tamer and you have to tame 4 werewolves) Frankie, Charlie, Bernie and Victor.the description and personalities of the characters will still be supplemented and corrected.If you find a mistake, please write about it in the comments.at the moment sometimes it happens that the bot writes on your behalf. just delete the message so that the bot writes a new one or use some prompt. I'm trying to fix this problem
